Fire Safety Training

Comprehensive fire safety training covering prevention, risk assessment, extinguisher use, and emergency procedures.

12,000 PKR

Management10 Days (Intensive Workshop)

OTHM Level 6 Diploma in OHS

Advanced qualification focused on strategic safety leadership and professional progression.

290,000 PKR

Management4 Days (22 Hours)

IOSH Managing Safely

Practical IOSH certification for supervisors and managers handling daily safety responsibilities.

25,000 PKR

Construction8 Days

OSHA (General and Construction)

Comprehensive OSHA-focused training for general and construction industry professionals.

Admissions Support

Request a Callback from Admissions

Need fast guidance on the right certification? Share your number and preferred time, and we will contact you.

Our Mission and Impact

We empower professionals and organizations with practical systems that reduce incidents, strengthen compliance, and build a sustainable culture of safety.

Addressing the Skills Gap

We prepare safety professionals for roles that industries urgently need, from site safety to strategic leadership.

Building Responsible Leaders

Our learning model emphasizes decision-making, accountability, and incident prevention under real operational pressure.

Inclusive Access to Learning

Through flexible payment and learner support, we help more candidates access globally relevant safety education.

Testimonials

What Our Learners Say

The trainers connected every module to real site incidents. I returned to work with practical tools that immediately improved toolbox talks and risk reporting.

Amina Khalid

HSE Officer, Construction Sector

LifeCare Academy made complex standards easy to apply. The course structure was professional, and the support team guided me from enrollment to certification.

Fahad Ullah

Operations Supervisor

I appreciated the balance of technical depth and coaching. The learning environment was disciplined, modern, and focused on career outcomes.

Sana Tariq

Safety Coordinator

Gallery

Inside LifeCare Academy

FAQs

Most Frequent Questions and Answers

NEBOSH International General Certificate is a globally respected qualification that equips managers and safety practitioners with a practical framework for risk control and legal compliance.

IOSH Managing Safely is practical health and safety training developed for supervisors and managers to confidently manage risks and improve team safety performance.

OBE stands for Outcome-Based Education, where learning is measured by demonstrated competence and practical application rather than theory alone.

We support flexible payments including installments. Once your admission is confirmed, our team shares secure payment details and due-date options.

Refunds may be considered according to enrollment stage and material access. Our admissions office reviews each case transparently and may offer transfer options when applicable.
